describe: Custom tokens/extra pass through verbatim (both modes; dark.tokens overrides in dark); structural --font-* refused; authored --primary verbatim; Rail-2 names all present.
notes: post-pivot pass-through contract. `overrideSurfaceOnly` here asserts the RAIL-2 synthesis guarantee (all shadcn names present) AND tolerates the extra custom vars. `passThrough` asserts the custom tokens are emitted verbatim (shared in both modes; dark.tokens overrides --elevation-1 in dark). --font-display is a structural --font-* name → dropped (mustNotContain). --primary is authored → emitted verbatim (faithful, no clamp).
